name: Sunflower Seeds
shortDescription: Premium sunflower seeds for snack mixes, salads, breakfast toppings, and easy everyday use.
description: Agree Superfoods Sunflower Seeds are a simple, crunchy seed option for snacking, topping, and everyday pantry use.
fullDescription: Sunflower seeds are easy to enjoy in snack mixes, topping routines, and pantry jars. Their mild flavour and familiar texture make them approachable for both regular seed users and first-time buyers.

Agree Superfoods presents sunflower seeds as a premium pantry ingredient that feels clean, versatile, and simple to revisit. The emphasis stays on kitchen usefulness, balanced messaging, and polished product presentation.
benefits: Adds crunch to snack mixes, salads, bowls, and baked foods
Easy to use without changing existing meal habits
Supports a broad, approachable premium seed range
usageIdeas: Mix into homemade trail mixes and snack jars
Sprinkle over salads, soups, or breakfast bowls
Use in crackers, granola, or everyday baking
bestFor: Customers looking for a mild, easy-to-use seed option
Premium pantry shelves with snack and topping appeal
Households building simple everyday food habits

productDetails.label: Storage
productDetails.value: Keep in a sealed pack in a cool, dry place

faqs.question: Where do sunflower seeds fit best in daily use?
faqs.answer: They are easy to use in snack mixes, breakfast bowls, salads, and simple baking recipes.

faqs.question: Do sunflower seeds work well with other seeds?
faqs.answer: Yes. They pair naturally with pumpkin, chia, and flax seeds in pantry mixes and topping routines.
